item.title: CVE-2026-9490 - CVE-2026-9490 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
CVE-2026-9490: The ACCSvc service creates a Named Pipe with a weak Security Descriptor that allows any authenticated user to connect and send messages. When a specially crafted message (message type 0x03) is sent to the pipe, the service crashes with exit code 1067 (ERROR_PROCESS_ABORTED).

item.title: CVE-2026-31431 - CVE-2026-31431 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
CVE-2026-31431-Linux-Copy-Fail: Exploit CVE-2026-31431 on Linux using a Rust implementation to achieve local privilege escalation via an arbitrary page cache write primitive.
copyfail-rs: Exploit and detect CVE-2026-31431 vulnerabilities using a static binary that monitors system integrity and bypasses PAM authentication.
